option.name: originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
updatedContent
originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/roomDetailsScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".RoomDetails">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lblRoomTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="Room" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Large" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/txtRoomName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="Room name" android:inputType="text" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSaveRoom" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="Save Room" />
<!-- Room Photo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/imgRoom" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:contentDescription="Room photo" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnTakePhoto" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="Take Photo" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPickGallery" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="From Gallery" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRemoveRoomPhoto" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:text="Remove Photo" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Windows Section --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Windows" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/txtSearchWindows" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:hint="Search windows" android:inputType="text" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lblWindowCount" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="0 Windows" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnAddWindow" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Add Window" /> </LinearLayout>
<au.edu.utas.kit305.tutorial05.WrapContentRecyclerView android:id="@+id/lstWindows" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnToggleWindows" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Show More Windows" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- Floor Spaces Section --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="Floor Spaces" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/txtSearchFloorSpaces" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:hint="Search floor spaces" android:inputType="text" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lblFloorSpaceCount" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="0 Floor Spaces" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnAddFloorSpace" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Add Floor Space" /> </LinearLayout>
<au.edu.utas.kit305.tutorial05.WrapContentRecyclerView android:id="@+id/lstFloorSpaces" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnToggleFloorSpaces" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="Show More Floor Spaces" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <ScrollView xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" xmlns:tools="http://schemas.android.com/tools" android:id="@+id/roomDetailsScroll" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="match_parent" tools:context=".RoomDetails">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="vertical" android:padding="16dp">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lblRoomTitle" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginBottom="8dp" android:text="@string/label_room" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Large" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/txtRoomName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:hint="@string/room_name_hint" android:inputType="text" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSaveRoom" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:text="@string/save_room" />
<!-- Room Photo --> <ImageView android:id="@+id/imgRoom" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="200dp" android:layout_marginTop="12dp" android:contentDescription="@string/room_photo_content_desc" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="8dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnTakePhoto" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="@string/btn_photo" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnPickGallery" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:layout_marginEnd="4dp" android:text="@string/btn_gallery" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnRemoveRoomPhoto" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:layout_marginStart="4dp" android:text="@string/remove_photo" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Windows Section --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/windows_section_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/txtSearchWindows" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:hint="@string/search_windows_hint" android:inputType="text" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lblWindowCount" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/window_count_initial" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnAddWindow" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/add_window" /> </LinearLayout>
<au.edu.utas.kit305.tutorial05.WrapContentRecyclerView android:id="@+id/lstWindows" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnToggleWindows" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/quote_show_more_windows" android:visibility="gone" />
<!-- Floor Spaces Section --> <TextView android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="16dp" android:text="@string/floor_spaces_section_title" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<EditText android:id="@+id/txtSearchFloorSpaces" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:hint="@string/search_floor_spaces_hint" android:inputType="text" />
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal">
<TextView android:id="@+id/lblFloorSpaceCount" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_gravity="center_vertical" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/floor_space_count_initial" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnAddFloorSpace" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/add_floor_space" /> </LinearLayout>
<au.edu.utas.kit305.tutorial05.WrapContentRecyclerView android:id="@+id/lstFloorSpaces" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:nestedScrollingEnabled="false" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnToggleFloorSpaces" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:text="@string/quote_show_more_floors" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout> </ScrollView>

option.name: originalContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" android:background="@drawable/item_rectangle_background" android:elevation="1dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="10dp" android:paddingBottom="10dp">
<!-- Name and dimensions --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtMeasurementName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtMeasurementDims" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Small" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Edit/Delete actions (always visible) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:gravity="end" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementEdit" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Edit" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementDelete" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Delete" android:textColor="#D32F2F" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Product selection row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtSelectedProduct" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="No product selected" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Small" android:textColor="#888888" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-light" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSelectProduct" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="Select Product" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imgMeasurementPhoto" android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:background="#EEEEEE" android:contentDescription="Measurement photo" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementPhoto" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Take Photo" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementGallery" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Gallery" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementRemovePhoto" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="Remove" android:textColor="#D32F2F" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#EEEEEE" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value:
<?xml version="1.0" encoding="utf-8"?> <LinearLayout xmlns:android="http://schemas.android.com/apk/res/android" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_marginTop="6dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:layout_marginBottom="6dp" android:background="@drawable/item_rectangle_background" android:elevation="1dp" android:orientation="vertical" android:paddingStart="12dp" android:paddingEnd="12dp" android:paddingTop="10dp" android:paddingBottom="10dp">
<!-- Name and dimensions --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:orientation="vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtMeasurementName" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Medium" android:textStyle="bold" />
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtMeasurementDims" android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Small" android:textColor="@android:color/darker_gray" /> </LinearLayout>
</LinearLayout>
<!-- Edit/Delete actions (always visible) --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:gravity="end" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementEdit" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/edit_room_action" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementDelete" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginStart="8dp" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/delete" android:textColor="#D32F2F" /> </LinearLayout>
<!-- Product selection row --> <LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:orientation="horizontal" android:gravity="center_vertical">
<TextView android:id="@+id/txtSelectedProduct" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/no_product_selected" android:textAppearance="@style/TextAppearance.AppCompat.Small" android:textColor="#888888" android:fontFamily="sans-serif-light" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnSelectProduct" android:layout_width="wrap_content" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:text="@string/select_product" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" /> </LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:gravity="center_vertical" android:orientation="horizontal">
<ImageView android:id="@+id/imgMeasurementPhoto" android:layout_width="64dp" android:layout_height="64dp" android:layout_marginEnd="8dp" android:background="#EEEEEE" android:contentDescription="@string/measurement_photo_content_desc" android:scaleType="centerCrop" android:visibility="gone" />
</LinearLayout>
<LinearLayout android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" android:orientation="horizontal">
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementPhoto" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/btn_photo" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementGallery" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/gallery" android:textColor="@color/purple_500" />
<Button android:id="@+id/btnMeasurementRemovePhoto" style="@style/Widget.AppCompat.Button.Borderless" android:layout_width="0dp" android:layout_height="wrap_content" android:layout_weight="1" android:text="@string/remove" android:textColor="#D32F2F" /> </LinearLayout>
<View android:layout_width="match_parent" android:layout_height="1dp" android:background="#EEEEEE" android:layout_marginTop="4dp" />
</LinearLayout>

option.name: originalContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Home Quote</string> <string name="error_house_required_fields">Customer name and address are required</string> <string name="error_house_save_failed">Could not save house</string> <string name="room_count_format">%1$d Rooms</string> <string name="house_count_format">%1$d Houses</string> <string name="label_room">Room</string> <string name="add_house">+ Add House</string> <string name="add_room">+ Add Room</string> <string name="delete_house_confirm">Delete this house and all its rooms?</string> <string name="delete_room_confirm">Delete this room?</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="no_product_selected">No product selected</string> <string name="select_product">Select Product</string> <string name="loading_products">Loading products…</string> <string name="error_network">Network error. Check your connection.</string> <string name="window_count_format">%1$d Windows</string> <string name="floor_space_count_format">%1$d Floor Spaces</string> <string name="house_actions_title">House Options</string> <string name="open_house">Open House</string> <string name="delete_house_action">Delete House</string> <string name="edit_house_action">Edit House</string> <string name="edit_room_action">Edit</string> <string name="create_room_action">Room</string> <string name="open_rooms_action">Open Rooms</string> <string name="label_house_rooms">House Rooms</string> <string name="view_quote">View Quote</string> <string name="quote_title_default">House Quote</string> <string name="quote_loading">Loading quote…</string> <string name="quote_address_missing">No address</string> <string name="quote_no_rooms">No rooms added yet.</string> <string name="quote_no_items">No windows or floor spaces added yet.</string> <string name="quote_room_heading">Room: %1$s</string> <string name="quote_window_line">Window — %1$s (%2$dmm × %3$dmm)</string> <string name="quote_floor_line">Floor — %1$s (%2$dmm × %3$dmm)</string> <string name="quote_product_line">Product: %1$s</string> <string name="quote_product_basic_window">Basic window rate</string> <string name="quote_product_basic_floor">Basic floor rate</string> <string name="quote_total_format">House total: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_room_subtotal_format">Items subtotal: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_room_labour_format">Labour: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_room_total_format">Room total: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_item_cost_format">Cost: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_item_area_format">Area: %1$.2f m²</string> <string name="quote_item_rate_format">Rate: $%1$.2f / m²</string> <string name="quote_item_panels_format">Panels: %1$d</string> <string name="quote_using_defaults">Product prices could not be loaded from the API. Using default rates for this quote.</string> <string name="quote_room_include_format">Include room: %1$s</string> <string name="quote_room_excluded">Room excluded from total</string> <string name="quote_item_include_format">Include %1$s: %2$s</string> <string name="quote_item_excluded">%1$s excluded from total</string> <string name="quote_window_label">window</string> <string name="quote_floor_label">floor space</string> <string name="quote_show_more_windows">Show More Windows</string> <string name="quote_show_less_windows">Show Less Windows</string> <string name="quote_show_more_floors">Show More Floor Spaces</string> <string name="quote_show_less_floors">Show Less Floor Spaces</string> <string name="share_quote">Share Quote</string> <string name="share_quote_chooser">Share quote via</string> <string name="quote_share_title_format">Quote for %1$s</string> <string name="apply_discount">Apply</string> <string name="clear_discount">Clear</string> <string name="discount_input_hint">Discount percent (0-100)</string> <string name="discount_none">No discount active</string> <string name="discount_applied_format">Discount applied: %1$.1f%% (-$%2$.2f)</string> <string name="discount_invalid">Enter a number from 0 to 100</string> <string name="quote_subtotal_format">House subtotal: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_discount_line_format">Discount (%1$.1f%%): -$%2$.2f</string> <string name="quote_total_after_discount_format">House total: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_share_address_format">Address: %1$s</string> </resources>

option.name: updatedContent
option.value: <resources> <string name="app_name">Home Quote</string> <string name="error_house_required_fields">Customer name and address are required</string> <string name="error_house_save_failed">Could not save house</string> <string name="room_count_format">%1$d Rooms</string> <string name="house_count_format">%1$d Houses</string> <string name="label_room">Room</string> <string name="add_house">+ Add House</string> <string name="add_room">+ Add Room</string> <string name="delete_house_confirm">Delete this house and all its rooms?</string> <string name="delete_room_confirm">Delete this room?</string> <string name="delete">Delete</string> <string name="cancel">Cancel</string> <string name="no_product_selected">No product selected</string> <string name="select_product">Select Product</string> <string name="loading_products">Loading products…</string> <string name="error_network">Network error. Check your connection.</string> <string name="window_count_format">%1$d Windows</string> <string name="floor_space_count_format">%1$d Floor Spaces</string> <string name="house_actions_title">House Options</string> <string name="open_house">Open House</string> <string name="delete_house_action">Delete House</string> <string name="edit_house_action">Edit House</string> <string name="edit_room_action">Edit</string> <string name="create_room_action">Room</string> <string name="open_rooms_action">Open Rooms</string> <string name="label_house_rooms">House Rooms</string> <string name="view_quote">View Quote</string> <string name="quote_title_default">House Quote</string> <string name="quote_loading">Loading quote…</string> <string name="quote_address_missing">No address</string> <string name="quote_no_rooms">No rooms added yet.</string> <string name="quote_no_items">No windows or floor spaces added yet.</string> <string name="quote_room_heading">Room: %1$s</string> <string name="quote_window_line">Window — %1$s (%2$dmm × %3$dmm)</string> <string name="quote_floor_line">Floor — %1$s (%2$dmm × %3$dmm)</string> <string name="quote_product_line">Product: %1$s</string> <string name="quote_product_basic_window">Basic window rate</string> <string name="quote_product_basic_floor">Basic floor rate</string> <string name="quote_total_format">House total: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_room_subtotal_format">Items subtotal: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_room_labour_format">Labour: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_room_total_format">Room total: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_item_cost_format">Cost: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_item_area_format">Area: %1$.2f m²</string> <string name="quote_item_rate_format">Rate: $%1$.2f / m²</string> <string name="quote_item_panels_format">Panels: %1$d</string> <string name="quote_using_defaults">Product prices could not be loaded from the API. Using default rates for this quote.</string> <string name="quote_room_include_format">Include room: %1$s</string> <string name="quote_room_excluded">Room excluded from total</string> <string name="quote_item_include_format">Include %1$s: %2$s</string> <string name="quote_item_excluded">%1$s excluded from total</string> <string name="quote_window_label">window</string> <string name="quote_floor_label">floor space</string> <string name="quote_show_more_windows">Show More Windows</string> <string name="quote_show_less_windows">Show Less Windows</string> <string name="quote_show_more_floors">Show More Floor Spaces</string> <string name="quote_show_less_floors">Show Less Floor Spaces</string> <string name="share_quote">Share Quote</string> <string name="share_quote_chooser">Share quote via</string> <string name="quote_share_title_format">Quote for %1$s</string> <string name="apply_discount">Apply</string> <string name="clear_discount">Clear</string> <string name="discount_input_hint">Discount percent (0-100)</string> <string name="discount_none">No discount active</string> <string name="discount_applied_format">Discount applied: %1$.1f%% (-$%2$.2f)</string> <string name="discount_invalid">Enter a number from 0 to 100</string> <string name="quote_subtotal_format">House subtotal: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_discount_line_format">Discount (%1$.1f%%): -$%2$.2f</string> <string name="quote_total_after_discount_format">House total: $%1$.2f</string> <string name="quote_share_address_format">Address: %1$s</string> <string name="house_dialog_customer_name_hint">Customer name</string> <string name="house_dialog_address_hint">Address</string> <string name="house_dialog_add_title">Add House</string> <string name="house_dialog_edit_title">Edit House</string> <string name="save">Save</string> <string name="error_customer_name_required">Customer name
